/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/screenmirror_demo.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/screenmirror_demo.dir/screenmirror_demo_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screenmirror_demo.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screenmirror_demo.dir/src/screenmirror_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screenmirror_demo.dir/src/wifi_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screenmirror_demo.dir/screenmirror_demo_autogen/3YJK5W5UP7/qrc_qml.cpp.o -o screenmirror_demo  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Quick.so.5.15.13 -L/home/runner/work/screen_mirror/screen_mirror/screenmirror_demo/../screenmirror_lib/build -lscreenmirror -ldl -lrt -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5QmlModels.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Qml.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
